titleStmt.title: SII 30.237: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 237. (A.R. No. 588 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sakaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the south wall of the mukha-maṇḍapa Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān: Year 5: 13th c. A.D.

summary.p: This is engraved in continuation of the above record. This record also deals with the same transaction. Vikramachōḻa is mentioned as the brother-in-law (machchāḻvi) of the king at whose instance this gift was made.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉacakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Ārināṭṭu śrīparāntakaccaturvvetimaṅkalattut teṉpiṭā
kai malaiyaṭikkuṟicciyilp piṇakkaṟuttiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tevakaṉmikkum civappirāmaṇaṟkum Ittevaṟkut tiruppa
ṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku malaimaṇṭalattuc ceṅkoṭikuṉṟaṉ cakrarāyutaṉāṉa vikramapāṇṭiyapaṉ
maṉ Ivvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal śaṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka koṇ(ṭu)ṭiṭṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa Ivvūr māṉāparaṇappereriyil
ceṉṉāṟṟu maṭaippokkil nilattukkuk kiḻellai puṅkaṅkuḷattu nirṉakkallukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ittevar te
vatāṉa nilattukkum Āloṭu nattatti vikkirama pāṇṭiya paṉmaṉ Ivvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal Oṟṟikoṇṭaṉupavittu varukiṟa nat
tattukku vaṭakkum melellai puṅkaṅkuḷattukku nirpāykiṟa kālukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkālukkut teṟku
m Āka ṉāṉkellaikkuppaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyum nattamum (n)toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉa
m paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viniyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭc
ciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvariyum Iṉavariyum poṉvariyum maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Añcāvatu mutal tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟukkavum Iṟukkumiṭattup pāḻcāvi nikkip payir koṇṭa nilattukku paṉṉiraṭikkolāl māttāl Iv
vūrk kaṭamai Iṟukkuṅ kālāl nellu Eḻukalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyilloṉṟu mukkālum tulā
viṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟupātiyum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippullu viḷainta nilattukku māttāl patiṉāṟumeṉi tira
mam Oṉṟum puṉcey viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tirimamRead- tiramamAraiyumāka Iṟuppatāka Iṟaikaṭṭap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu mac
cāḻvi vikramacoḻatevar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukku malai
maṇṭalattuc ceṅkoṭikkuṉṟaṉ cakrāyutaṉāṉa vikramapāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉukku Ivvūrk kāraṇavarpakkal caṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka
koṇṭaṉupavittu varukiṟa Ivvūr māṉāparaṇappereriyil teṉ nāṟṟu maṭaipokkil nilattukku kiḻellai puṅkaṅkuḷa
ttu nirnakkallukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ittevar tevatāṉa nilattukkum Āloṭunattattil Ivvikkirama
pāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉ Ivvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal Oṟṟikoṇṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nattattukku vaṭakkum melellai puṅkaṅ
kuḷattukku nirpāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkālukku teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉce
yum nattamum (n)toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Anta
rāyamum viniyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyaārāṭciyum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalppeṟum
Ilāñciṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoḷipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyarvariyum Iṉavariyum poṉvariyum maṟṟumeppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa
Ivvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyā yiṟukkavum Iṟukkumiṭattup pāḻcāvi nikkip payiṟkoṇṭa nilattukku paṉṉi
raṭik kolāl māttāl Ivvūrk kaṭamai Iṟukkum kālāl nel Eḻukalamum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricai Oṉṟumukkālum
tulāviṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟupātiyum Eḷ varaku tiṉaip pullu viḷainta nilattukku māttālp patiṉāṟumeṉit tiramam Oṉ
ṟum puṉcey viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tirama maraiyum Āka Iṟuppatāka Iṭṭu variyilāṟ Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam keḻviyuntarac coṉṉom kaikkoṇ
ṭutiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimattaṅkaḷ cellappaṇṇi nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlakkallu ṉāṭṭi Ippaṭi cantirā dityavaṟ celvatā
ka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittu koḷka .. cevvirukkai nāṭṭu yalaraiyaṉ vaṇṭuvaraip perumāṉāṉa kulai
Digital edition of SII 30.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
